title: Tamonea arabica

The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group, comprising around 600 genera and over 13,000 species. Tamonea arabica is a member of the genus Tamonea, which is part of the tribe Psychotrieae. Further classification within the Rubiaceae family is based on morphological and genetic characteristics.
